name: model-status-worker
description: Single-Worker Cloudflare deployment inspired by WizisCool/model-status

scripts.dev: node ./ensure-dev-vars.mjs && npm run build:web && wrangler dev -c wrangler.template.jsonc --local
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:worker
scripts.migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local -c wrangler.template.jsonc
